issues: fetch_prices is called without required kwargs 'tickers' as per adapter contract
DataFrame filtering and indexing logic is incorrect and inconsistent with adapter output columns ('date', 'value')
Position dictionary access is incorrect: pos.get(symbol) returns None, should check pos.get(symbol) dict for 'entry_date' and 'entry_price'
Exit condition price retracement logic is reversed: spec requires exit if price retracement > 3% (price dropped by 3%), code checks if price increased by >3%
Indentation errors in code cause logic blocks to be malformed
Signal logic does not strictly follow spec: entry is short position on >6% gain, but code treats RISK_ON as buy (long) instead of short
Allocation logic uses 5% allocation on RISK_ON but spec implies entering short position, allocation logic does not reflect short position sizing or max exposure constraints
